title: Client: Outbox with retry on reconnect
description:
If the relay is unreachable when the user sends, the message is lost. No retry, no buffering.

Required:
- Outbox table in local SQLite: (id, to, payload, created_at, sent_at nullable)
- On send: write to outbox first, then attempt relay delivery
- On connect: drain outbox and attempt relay delivery for unsent rows
- On SendAck: mark outbox row as sent
- Prune sent rows older than 7 days
- Show pending count in chat prompt: '(3 pending) > '
close_reason: outbox references SendAck which was removed in broadcast redesign. Broadcast model has no per-message acks. Local outbox needs a fresh design once MLS and at-least-once semantics are defined.
